fields.heading: Healthcare Staffing Agency in London
fields.sub: Vigil Care Staffing supplies fully vetted healthcare assistants, support workers, and healthcare cleaners to care providers across Greater London.

fields.heading: A healthcare staffing agency for London care providers
fields.body: Vigil Care Staffing is a healthcare staffing agency supplying vetted care-sector workers to providers across Greater London. When you need to fill a rota gap safely and quickly, we connect you with people who are checked, referenced, and ready to work. We work with residential and nursing homes, supported living services, and other care providers, supplying healthcare assistants, support workers, and healthcare cleaners for temporary, short-notice, and ongoing cover. Vigil Care Staffing supplies workers only and does not operate regulated care services. That focus means our whole process is built around finding you dependable staff and responding promptly when you get in touch.

items.title: Healthcare Assistants (HCAs)
items.body: Vetted HCAs to support daily living, mobility, and personal care in care homes, supported living, and other care settings across Greater London.

items.title: Support Workers
items.body: Experienced support workers who help people live well day to day, matched to the needs of your service.

items.title: Healthcare Cleaners
items.body: Cleaners trained to healthcare cleaning standards for care homes, clinics, and supported living, helping maintain safe, hygienic environments.

items.title: Short-Notice Cover
items.body: When a shift falls through, we work quickly to supply a suitable vetted worker so your rota stays covered.

items.title: Temporary and Ongoing Placements
items.body: Book a single shift, block cover, or longer arrangements while you recruit, with support that flexes around your needs.

items.title: Responsive Communication
items.body: We follow up promptly on staffing requests and keep you informed throughout, so you always know where a booking stands.

fields.heading: How our healthcare staffing works
fields.body: Getting cover in place is straightforward. You share the role, setting, and dates you need to fill, and we match a suitable worker from our vetted Greater London pool. We confirm the details with you, brief the worker on your requirements, and stay in contact through the placement. If a short-term booking turns into a longer need, we can extend it and, where possible, keep the same worker for continuity.

fields.heading: Our vetting and compliance standards
fields.body: Every worker we supply is DBS-checked, right-to-work verified, and referenced before placement. We assess relevant skills for the role and, because our workers are directly employed, we keep their training and documentation up to date. Our recruitment follows a CQC-compliant process. We supply staff rather than deliver regulated care, so our attention stays firmly on the quality and reliability of the people we place with you.

items.q: What types of care workers do you supply?
items.a: We supply healthcare assistants, support workers, and healthcare cleaners to care providers across Greater London, for temporary, short-notice, and ongoing cover.
You can share the role, setting, and dates you need to fill, and we will match a suitable vetted worker and confirm the details with you.
Yes. Every worker is DBS-checked, right-to-work verified, and referenced before placement, with relevant skills assessed for the role.

items.q: Do you operate care services yourselves?
items.a: No. Vigil Care Staffing supplies vetted care-sector workers to providers. We are not a regulated care provider and are not CQC-registered.
We supply care-sector workers to providers across Greater London.

fields.heading: Need dependable care staff in London?
fields.sub: Tell us what you need and we will match vetted workers to your rota.
